entities.description: Farming practices that avoid the burning of crop residues

entities.name: MULCHING

entities.name: CROP RESIDUE
entities.description: Plant material left in the field after the harvest

entities.name: STRAW

entities.description: Learning about no-burn practices through interaction with other farmers

entities.name: EXTENSION AGENCIES
entities.description: Organizations that provide agricultural training and information to farmers

entities.name: FARM SIZE
entities.description: The scale of land ownership which influences learning strategies

entities.name: MULTIPRONG POLICY
entities.description: A comprehensive policy approach combining equipment access and learning platforms

entities.name: NO-BURN TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Technical solutions used to manage crop residue without burning
